details: The "Motorized Tricycle Yojana" is a scheme implemented by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Rajasthan. Under this scheme, motorized tricycles are provided to eligible applicants for purposes such as self-employment and pursuing higher education from Senior Higher Secondary onwards. To be eligible for the scheme, the applicant must be a resident of Rajasthan, a specially-abled person with 50% or more locomotor disability, and possess driving experience along with a valid driving license.
benefits: Under this scheme, beneficiaries will receive a motorized tricycle free of cost to support self-employment and higher education from the Senior Secondary level onwards.
eligibility: The applicant must be a native of Rajasthan.
The applicant should be self-employed or a student pursuing senior higher secondary education.
The applicant must have a 50% or more locomotor disability.
The annual family (parents/guardians including applicant's income, if any) income should not exceed ₹2,50,000/-.
The applicant's age must be 18 years or older.
The applicant must have prior experience in operating a vehicle and hold a valid driving license.

offline: The interested applicant should visit the office of the District Social Justice & Empowerment Department and request a copy of the application form from the staff exclusively entrusted to issue and collect filled-in applications.
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the District Social Justice & Empowerment Department.

Request a receipt or acknowledgment from the District Social Justice & Empowerment Department to whom the application has been submitted. Ensure that the receipt contains essential details such as the date and time of submission and a unique identification number (if applicable).

faqs.question: Who can apply for the Motorized Tricycle Scheme?
faqs.answer: Specially-abled individuals with 50% or more locomotor disability residing in Rajasthan can apply.

faqs.question: Is the tricycle provided free of cost?
faqs.answer: Yes, eligible applicants receive the motorized tricycle free of cost.

faqs.question: Can I apply online for the scheme?
faqs.answer: No, If an online application facility is available, details will be provided by the concerned department.

faqs.question: What is the age requirement for applying?
faqs.answer: The applicant must be 18 years or older.

faqs.question: Is a driving license necessary for availing the benefit?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant must hold a valid driving license.

faqs.question: Where can I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applications can be submitted at the District Social Justice & Empowerment Department.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Documents include a disability certificate, residence proof and driving license, etc.

faqs.question: What is the maximum income limit for eligibility?
faqs.answer: The annual family income should not exceed ₹2,50,000.

faqs.question: Can applicant from other states apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only applicants from Rajasthan are eligible to apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: Can a student apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, students pursuing Senior Higher Secondary education or above can apply
